info.name: Hostel Booking API
info.description:
Complete collection for the Hostel Booking API. Set `baseUrl`, `token`, and the ID variables before running requests.

**Typical testing order:**
1. Health Check
2. Admin → Create University
3. University → Reset Password → Register Landlord
4. Landlord → Reset Password → Create Hostel → Add Room
5. Student → Register → Get Hostels → Create Booking → Process Payment

variable.description: Clerk Frontend API base URL (decoded from CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY)
Email of the user you want to sign in as
Set automatically by Step 1 of the sign-in flow
Clerk session JWT — set automatically by Step 2 of the sign-in flow
UUID of any non-admin user (for suspend/unsuspend/delete)
UUID returned when a university is created
UUID returned when a hostel is created
UUID returned when a room is added
UUID returned when a booking is created

item.name: Auth (Get Token)
item.description: Two-step Clerk sign-in flow. Fill in `signInEmail` and `signInPassword` in the collection variables, run Step 1 then Step 2. The `token` variable is set automatically after Step 2 — every protected request will then work.

exec: console.error('Could not find sign-in id in response', JSON.stringify(body));

request.description:
Initiates a Clerk sign-in. Sends the user's email as the identifier. On success the `signInId` variable is set automatically.

Do **not** change the Content-Type — Clerk's Frontend API requires `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` here.

exec: // Clerk returns the JWT inside client.sessions[0].last_active_token.jwt
console.error('JWT not found in session', JSON.stringify(sessions[0]));

request.description: Submits the password for the sign-in started in Step 1. On success the `token` variable is set to the Clerk session JWT automatically — all `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` requests in this collection will now work.
Liveness check. No auth required.

item.name: Admin
item.description: All routes require a valid admin Bearer token.

request.description: Returns all non-admin users. Use the optional `role` query param to filter.
Returns all universities in the system.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns all landlords with their affiliated university.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns all students with their affiliated university.
Creates a university account in Clerk and the local DB. Sends a welcome email with login credentials.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Sets `is_suspended = true` in the DB and bans the user in Clerk so they cannot obtain new sessions.
Clears the suspension flag in the DB and unbans the user in Clerk.
Deletes a user and all associated data from both the DB and Clerk. Cannot target the admin account.

item.name: University
item.description: Routes for university accounts. Auth/logout routes do not require a suspension check.

request.description: Changes the university account password and clears the `first_login` flag.
Revokes the current Clerk session.
Creates a landlord account. Accepts multipart/form-data. `ownership_documents` accepts up to 10 files (max 10 MB each).
Returns all landlords registered under this university.
Returns all students registered under this university.
Returns all hostels associated with this university (via its landlords).

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Landlord
item.description: Routes for landlord accounts. Auth/logout routes do not require a suspension check.

request.description: Changes the landlord password and clears the `first_login` flag.
Revokes the current Clerk session.
Creates a hostel. Accepts multipart/form-data. `images` accepts up to 10 files (max 10 MB each).

formdata.value: Secure hostel 5 minutes from the main gate.

formdata.description: One or more hostel image files

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Returns all hostels belonging to the authenticated landlord, with their rooms.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns a single hostel with full room details.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Hostel fetched successfully",

      {

request.description: Adds a room to an existing hostel. `room_type` must be `single_self_contained` or `double_self_contained`.
Partially updates room details. All fields are optional.
Returns all notifications for the landlord, newest first.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Student
item.description: Public registration and auth routes, plus protected hostel browsing and notifications.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns all universities for use in the student registration dropdown.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Public endpoint. Self-registers a student. `university_id` must be a valid UUID from the universities list.

response.name: 409 Already Registered

request.description: Revokes the current Clerk session.
Returns all hostels in the student's university. Scoped automatically from the token.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns a single hostel with room availability details.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns all notifications for the student, newest first.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Booking
item.description: All booking routes require a student token and an active (non-suspended) account.

request.description: Books an available room. A student may hold only one active booking at a time. `room_id` must be a valid UUID.

response.name: 400 Room Not Available
409 Active Booking Exists

request.description: Returns all bookings (active and terminated) for the authenticated student.
Returns a single booking with room and hostel details.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Terminates an active booking. Decrements `occupied_slots` and restores room availability if it was full.

item.name: Payment
item.description: All payment routes require a student token and an active (non-suspended) account.

request.description:
Records a payment for a booking. `partial` pays 50% of the room price (allowed once). `full` pays 100%. No further payments accepted once a full payment exists.

`payment_method`: `mtn_mobile_money` | `airtel_mobile_money`
`payment_type`: `partial` | `full`

response.name: 400 Already Paid
400 Partial Already Used

request.description: Returns all payments made against a specific booking.
